case_title: SHIRLEY ANN SMART VS. MISSION BAY HOUSING PARTNERS, L.P.

docket_entries.description: APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68511.3 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF SMART, SHIRLEY ANN ORDER GRANTING WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO CRC 3.50 - 3.63
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT MISSION BAY HOUSING PARTNERS, L.P.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SMART, SHIRLEY ANN IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT MISSION BAY HOUSING PARTNERS, L.P. THE EVIDENCE SUBMITTED WAS NOT SUFFICIENT TO ESTABLISH AN AWARD OF MONETARY DAMAGES. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED NOV-05-2008, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT MISSION BAY HOUSING PARTNERS, L.P.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-16-2008 - JUDGMENT.
SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF DEC-16-2008 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF DEC-16-2008 BY PAUL SLAVIT. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED MAR-02-2009 ORDERED DESTROYED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY SMART, SHIRLEY ANN AS TO DEFENDANT MISSION BAY HOUSING PARTNERS, L.P. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-16-2008 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
